title: Slovakian Caraway Seed Focaccia
description: A traditional Slovakian bread infused with the warm, nutty flavor of caraway seeds, perfect for snacking or as a side dish.
instructions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine warm water and yeast.
2. Let the mixture sit for 5-10 minutes, until yeast is activated.
3. Add caraway seeds, rye flour, all-purpose flour, and salt to the bowl.
4. Mix the dough until it comes together in a sticky ball.
5. Knead the dough for 10-15 minutes, until it becomes smooth and elastic.
6. Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with plastic wrap, and let it rise for 1-2 hours.
8. Punch down the dough and shape it into a rectangle.
9. Place the dough on a baking sheet, drizzle with olive oil, and bake for 20-25 minutes.
10. Remove the focaccia from the oven and let it cool for 5-10 minutes before slicing.
